name: pixel-weather
description: Pixel-art clouds, rain, and thunder in a strip above your editor — matches your theme background.

weather.enabled.description: Show the animated weather panel above the editor.
weather.enabled.markdownDescription: Show the animated weather panel above the editor. Turn off to hide all weather effects.

weather.showOnStartup.description: Open the weather panel automatically when Cursor starts.
weather.showOnStartup.markdownDescription: Open the weather panel automatically when Cursor starts.

enumDescriptions: Place the panel area above the editor.
Place the panel area below the editor.
weather.panelPosition.description: Where the weather panel sits in the editor panel area.
weather.panelPosition.markdownDescription: Whether the weather panel appears at the **top** or **bottom** of the editor panel area.

weather.intensity.description: How strong rain, clouds, snow, and other effects appear (0–2).
weather.intensity.markdownDescription:
How strong rain, clouds, snow, and other effects appear.

- **0** — barely visible
- **1** — balanced (default)
- **2** — very heavy

weather.dayNight.description: Follow your local clock for sun, moon, and stars.
weather.dayNight.markdownDescription: Follow your local clock for sun, moon, stars, and sky brightness.

weather.birds.description: Occasionally show bird flocks in clear or mild weather.
weather.birds.markdownDescription: Occasionally show bird flocks during sunny, cloudy, or rainy weather.

weather.mountains.description: Show pixel-art mountains along the horizon.
weather.mountains.markdownDescription: Show pixel-art mountains along the bottom of the weather strip.

enumDescriptions: Snow appears in December, January, and February.
weather.snowSeason.markdownDescription:
Control when snow effects can appear.

- **auto** — winter months only (Dec–Feb)
- **always** — snow any time of year
- **never** — no snow

weather.cycleIntervalMin.description: Minimum minutes before weather may change on its own.
weather.cycleIntervalMin.markdownDescription: Minimum minutes before weather may change on its own.

weather.cycleIntervalMax.description: Maximum minutes before weather changes on its own.
weather.cycleIntervalMax.markdownDescription: Maximum minutes before weather changes on its own. Should be greater than or equal to the minimum interval.

weather.pauseWhenHidden.description: Pause animation when the weather panel is not visible.
weather.pauseWhenHidden.markdownDescription: Pause animation when the weather panel is hidden or collapsed to save CPU.

enumDescriptions: Simple in-panel settings for everyday use.
In-panel developer controls with live weather overrides and testing tools.
weather.uiMode.markdownDescription:
Controls what the ☰ menu in the weather panel shows.

Use **Pixel Weather: Use Normal Settings Mode** or **Pixel Weather: Use Developer Mode** to switch quickly.

commands.title: Pixel Weather: Use Normal Settings Mode
